name: ezkey-sdk-typescript-workspace
description: Workspace for the public Ezkey TypeScript Integration SDK and demo

scripts.build: npm run build -w ezkey-integration-sdk && npm run build -w ezkey-demo-api && npm run build -w ezkey-demo-ui
scripts.demo: concurrently -n api,ui -c blue,green "npm run start:dev -w ezkey-demo-api" "npm run dev -w ezkey-demo-ui"
